_comment: Test vectors for the identity format. Hash values are computed by the reference implementation (Go encoding/json + crypto/sha256). Run 'go test ./doc/spec/...' to verify.

id_derivation.description: Identity ID is the SHA-256 of the exact bytes of the first version blob.
id_derivation.note: The expected_id depends on the exact bytes produced by Go's json.Marshal of the version struct, including format version=2, all fields, and the nonce. Fill in by running the reference implementation.

tree_entries.description: Git tree for any identity commit (all versions use the same structure)
notes: Exactly one entry named 'version'. No clock entries, no extra subtree.
The blob hash is the SHA-256 of the version JSON bytes (this is also the version's ID).
The identity ID equals hex(sha256(these exact JSON bytes)) for the first version.

version_examples.description: Identity version with a public key

json.name: Alice
pub_keys:
-----BEGIN PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----
<armored key data>
-----END PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----

notes: pub_keys is an array of armored OpenPGP public key strings.
The OpenPGP key's creation time is set to the zero value and must be ignored.
